What should have happened?

What happened instead?

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, cookies, tokens, logs, traces, HAR files, or screenshots are attached.
- [ ] No private customer/client/storefront data is included.
- [ ] The report does not request automation, browser actions, form submission, bypass behavior, or workflow execution.
